qas.q: What must be done if damage is detected on an air cylinder
qas.a: Remove it from service and replace it with a new cylinder

qas.q: What chemical is mixed with water to clean the SCBA
The bell alarm is only available on SCBA configuration(s) __________.
Which component provides a visual monitor of the remaining air supply and battery power for the AV 3000® facepiece?
What must be done with any SCBA that does not satisfactorily pass inspection?
qas.a: Remove it from service and tag it for repair

qas.q: For components manufactured before February of 2000, what manufacturer information can be determined from 69-60-0416
Before use, the SCBA cylinder must be charged to at least _____ PSIG.
Prior to donning the head harness, all straps must be __________.
Unlike the quick-charge method, cylinder replacement does not allow the user to do what
What is the working pressure of the SCBA Scott® Air-Pak® 4.5?
The pressure reducer has a label showing both a serial number and a __________.
When is an "Operational Inspection" required
qas.a: When it is certain the SCBA user is out of the hazardous area

qas.q: When may the facepiece be safely removed
qas.a: On the side of the regulator body

qas.q: Where is the serial number/manufacturer number located on the mask-mounted regulator?
When should SCBA be cleaned
What must be done with an air cylinder that does not indicate a minimum 4000 PSIG prior to use
Which component will relieve cylinder pressure at 7200 PSIG
What is the minimum amount of time that the facepiece must be agitated in the sanitizing solution?
Where should the majority of the SCBA's weight rest on your body?
qas.a: Leave the hazardous area at once

qas.q: When the cylinder air supply reaches 25% of its rated service capacity and the Vibralert®, bell alarm, or HUD activate, what is the recommended action?
When cleaning the facepiece and mask-mounted regulator, how many tablespoons of Wescodyne-G are required per 1½ gallons of warm water to create an effective sanitizing solution?
The mask-mounted regulator is equipped with which of the following components
qas.a: Rotate the purge knob fully counterclockwise and leave the space

qas.q: If the user is not receiving enough air in a firefighting situation through the mask-mounted regulator, what can be done to increase the flow of air into the nosecup assembly?
qas.a: The vibralert and bell alarm are activated

qas.q: What happens if the primary air path fails in Configuration 1, 2, or 3
qas.a: It is used to refill the cylinder without removing the SCBA from the user
